ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT WESTE RN COLLECTION BUREAU

DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION AND TO PRODUCE RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $301.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
